Index.title: Efraín: Word Explorer
Index.subtitle: Discover the treasures of the Hebrew Bible

efrain.name: Efrain
efrain.description: A 9-year-old explorer boy with a heart full of questions and bravery. He loves discovering treasures in the Hebrew Bible.

jesus.name: Jesus
jesus.description: The Teacher and Savior. He always has words of love and truth for Efrain and all children.

abuela.name: Grandmother
abuela.description: The wise one of the family. She tells the best stories and always knows how to relate the Word to daily life.

samuel.name: Samuel
samuel.description: Efrain's best friend. Together they live great adventures while learning about Jehovah's promises.

susana.name: Susana
susana.description: Efrain's little sister. She is very curious and always ready to listen to a new story.

abuelo.name: Grandfather
abuelo.description: The guardian of tools and traditions. He always teaches Efrain to care for the land with love.

mama.name: Mother
mama.description: The heart of the home. Her hugs and faith guide Efrain in every step of his adventures.

papa.name: Father
papa.description: A hard-working and brave man. He teaches Efrain that strength comes from trusting in Jehovah.

asno.name: Little Donkey
asno.description: The faithful companion. Reminds us of humility and service in biblical stories.

oveja.name: Little Sheep
oveja.description: Small and cheerful. Teaches us about the Good Shepherd who always cares for and protects us.

caballo.name: Little Horse
caballo.description: Strong and fast. Represents the nobility and strength that Jehovah gives us to run our races.

chivo.name: Little Goat
chivo.description: Playful and bouncy. Reminds us of the joy of living in our Creator's creation.

collie.name: Collie
collie.description: The smartest watchdog. Always attentive to take care of Efrain and warn of any danger.

galli_pato.name: Galli-Pato
galli_pato.description: The feathery friends of the farm who wake everyone up with joy every morning.

najar.name: Najar
najar.description: A wise friend who knows many secrets of nature and ancient stories.

toro.name: Bull
toro.description: Imposing and hard-working. Symbol of perseverance in the work we do for Jehovah.

vaca.name: Cow
vaca.description: Calm and generous. Teaches us about provision and peace in the countryside.
